name: College Advising Corps Scholar Award

eligibility.other_requirements: Must attend a high school served by a College Advising Corps adviser; first-generation and/or low-income student; must be applying to a four-year college

stackable_notes: External scholarship; generally stackable with institutional aid. Some colleges may reduce need-based grants for outside awards — check school policy.
notes: Awards are connected to schools served by College Advising Corps advisers — eligibility is geographic/program-based, not a broad open application. Students must attend a partnered high school. The primary CAC mission is providing college advising; scholar awards supplement that mission. Students at CAC-served schools should ask their on-site adviser directly about available scholarship opportunities.
